ddls:
CREATE TABLE "registers" (
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register */,
  "register_name" TEXT /* Full name of the register */,
  "short_form" TEXT /* Short form or abbreviation of the register */,
  "register_type" TEXT /* Type of the register (e.g., Control, Status, Data) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the register in the microcontroller */,
  "initial_state" TEXT /* Initial state of the register */,
  "microcontroller_model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the microcontroller model the register belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the register's purpose and functionality */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the register if not specified */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Specifies the access type (e.g., Read, Write, Read/Write) */,
  "bit_fields" TEXT /* JSON field to store bit-level configurations */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the register was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the register */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_microcontroller_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("microcontroller_model_id") REFERENCES microcontroller_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "microcontroller_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microcontroller model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the microcontroller model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the microcontroller model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the microcontroller model was released */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Microcontroller architecture (e.g., ARM, AVR) */,
  "pin_count" INTEGER /* Number of pins in the microcontroller */,
  "max_frequency" REAL /* Maximum operating frequency */,
  "memory_size" TEXT /* Size of the memory (Flash, RAM, EEPROM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the register */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the register */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the changes were made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the changes */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., Draft, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_versions_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Engineer, Developer, QA) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., Read, Write, Delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)
